mapper.select: SELECT id, name, role, phone, email, password, email_hash, phone_hash FROM user
SELECT id, name, role, phone, email, password, email_hash, phone_hash FROM user WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, role, phone, email, password, email_hash, phone_hash FROM user WHERE email_hash = #{hash} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user(name, role, phone, email, password, email_hash, phone_hash) VALUES (#{name}, #{role}, #{phone, typeHandler=org.example.housebackend.typehandler.EncryptedStringTypeHandler}, #{email, typeHandler=org.example.housebackend.typehandler.EncryptedStringTypeHandler}, #{password}, #{emailHash}, #{phoneHash})
